mapper.select: SELECT DATE(transaction_time) AS date, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN transaction_type = 1 AND status = 2 THEN customer_id END) AS rechargeUserCount, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN transaction_type = 1 AND status = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalIncome, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN transaction_type = 2 AND status = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalExpense, (COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN transaction_type = 1 AND status = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN transaction_type = 2 AND status = 2 THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0)) AS totalProfit FROM customer_transactions WHERE DATE(transaction_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND deleted_flag IS NULL GROUP BY DATE(transaction_time) ORDER BY DATE(transaction_time) DESC
